programme.title: Deditos

programme.title: Arise Kids TV

programme.title: Kids Beach Club

programme.title: View & Chew

programme.title: New Creation Church
programme.desc: Pastor Joseph Prince preaches messages centred on the pure gospel of the grace of God. His desire is to help believers understand grace and how deeply loved they are by their heavenly Father.

programme.title: The Kindness Diaries

programme.title: Be That
programme.desc: We all have plans for our relationships and work to keep things on the right path. Sometimes, chronic illness or pain gets in the way.

programme.title: Aurora Teagarden: Real Murders
programme.desc: Aurora finds a group member killed in a way that resembles the crime the club was about to discuss. As other 'copycat' killings follow, Aurora will have to uncover the person behind the game.

programme.title: Hometown Remedy

programme.title: Live @ Psalter Studios
programme.desc: Docu-music series featuring an array of Christian musicians including such artists as Josh Cunningham (The Waifs), Anna Weatherup and Castles In Air, an Indie Rock band from California.

programme.title: Hour of Power
programme.desc: Bobby Schuller provides principles and practices that can help people become happy students of Jesus and live a life of meaning believing there is no fuller, richer life than the one that is lived in Christ.

programme.title: Joel Osteen

programme.title: Give Me an Answer
programme.sub-title: Why do we not Follow the laws in the Bible?
programme.desc: The shows are recorded on college campus across the United States, Cliffe Knechtle engages with skeptical students and professors, to give real answers to the tough questions about Christianity.

programme.title: Summer in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie and Nate are gearing up for the town's largest event. When an issue with the new wine puts things in jeopardy, the relationship and the partnership will be put to test.

programme.title: Valentine in the Vineyard
programme.desc: Frankie & Nate have just gotten engaged when Frankie's cousin & Nate's brother tell them that they're getting married on Valentine's Day.

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong

programme.desc: Betrayal can wreck the lives of both the betrayer and the betrayed. The envy of Joseph's brothers led them to do horrible things, but God was at work in the life of Joseph.

programme.title: Planetshakers
programme.desc: Join Planetshakers for their church service in Melbourne. A fresh Word with praise and worship each week. Live empowered.

programme.desc: Marriages should be built on the foundations taught in the Bible. Matthew 19. (San Antonio 1970.

programme.desc: Powerful words from Evangelist and Pastor Bill Newman.

programme.title: Impact for Life

programme.title: Life with Paul De Jong
programme.desc: We like to call it 'soul food'. This program uses creative illustration, real life stories and biblical teaching to encourage and help viewers discover a greater purpose to their lives.

programme.title: David Jeremiah
programme.desc: With his respected position in Potiphar's house Joseph could have given in to temptation, but because he stayed true to his convictions and loyal to God, he was able to achieve victory over temptation.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Will of God in Your Life/The Courage to Face Life's Trials
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: Thelma
programme.desc: When 93-year-old Thelma Post gets duped by a phone scammer pretending to be her grandson, she sets out on a treacherous quest across the city to reclaim what was taken from her.

programme.title: Emilia Perez
programme.desc: Follows four women in Mexico chasing happiness. Cartel leader Emilia recruits lawyer Rita to fake her death and live authentically as her true self.

programme.title: Jeanne Du Barry
programme.desc: The life of Jeanne Becu, who was born as the illegitimate daughter of a seamstress in 1743 and went on to rise through the Court of Louis XV to become his last official mistress.

programme.title: The Color Purple
programme.desc: Torn from her sister Nettie and her children, Celie faces many hardships in her life, including an abusive husband. Celie finds strength in the unbreakable bonds of sisterhood.

programme.title: And Mrs
programme.desc: When a reluctant bride-to-be's fiance drops dead, she insists on marrying him anyway, vowing to overcome public opinion, the law of the land, and her loved one's objections.

programme.title: Wicked
programme.desc: In Oz, two clashing witches, Elphaba and Glinda, form an unlikely friendship. Elphaba, wrongly labeled wicked, seeks to expose the corrupt Wizard ruling the land.

programme.title: Maria
programme.desc: Famed opera singer Maria Callas retreats to Paris in the 1970s after a glamorous yet tumultuous life in the public eye.

programme.title: Dune: Part Two

programme.desc: Eddie Brock and Venom must make a devastating decision as they're pursued by a mysterious military man and alien monsters from Venom's home world.

programme.title: I.S.S.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania
programme.desc: Welcome to the Hotel Transylvania. Dracula, who runs a five-stake resort away from the human world, goes into overprotective mode when a boy discovers the resort and falls for the count's daughter.

programme.title: Shrek

programme.desc: When an island populated by happy, flightless birds is visited by mysterious outsiders, it is up to two unlikely outcasts, and birds with temper problems, to set things right.

programme.desc: When a pizza chef is released from prison after 15 years, the only shop he can afford is in a housing commission suburb. Cult TV classics collide in this riotous tale.

programme.title: Mr. Deeds
programme.desc: Life flips over for a small-town pizzeria owner and poet who inherits $40 billion. Sleazy moguls come to whisk him and his money away to corporate America.

programme.title: Ghostbusters: Afterlife
programme.desc: When a single mother and her two kids arrive in a small town, they begin to discover their connection to the original Ghostbusters and the secret legacy their grandfather left behind.

programme.title: Tag

programme.title: Anchorman: The Legend of Ron Burgundy
programme.desc: When Ron Burgundy is told he will be working with a young, ambitious newswoman, it turns to war.

programme.title: Old School

programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Sudden Death
programme.desc: Sudden death takes on a whole new meaning in this suspenseful action tale where a retired fire-fighter's daughter gets caught up in a terrorist's plan to blow up 17,000 hockey fans.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.

programme.title: Uncle Buck
programme.desc: An idle, good-natured bachelor, Uncle Buck is the last person you would think of to watch the kids. However, during a family crisis, he is suddenly left in charge of his nephew and nieces.

programme.title: Ferris Bueller's Day Off
programme.desc: Larger than life, and blessed with a magical sense of serendipity, Ferris Bueller is a model for all those who take themselves too seriously.

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: Samantha's 16th birthday should be perfect and memorable. But her whole family is preoccupied with her sister's wedding and completely forgets Samantha's big day.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Footloose (1984)
programme.desc: In this beloved classic, a Chicago teen ends up in a town where dancing is banned by the local preacher. He then teams up with the preacher's daughter and gets everyone dancin'.

programme.title: Twins
programme.desc: An experiment to create a perfect human produced not one, but two twins in mismatched shapes. They set off on a comic adventure to find their mother.

programme.title: Parenthood
programme.desc: An unforgettable and hilarious portrait of life's most rewarding occupation: Parenthood. The Buckmans are a modern-day family facing the age-old dilemma of trying to raise children the right way.

programme.title: Blues Brothers 2000
programme.desc: Sequel to the 1980 cult classic, Jake and Elwood must reunite the old band, with a few new members, and go on another "Mission from God".

programme.title: Sixteen Candles
programme.desc: Samantha's 16th birthday should be perfect and memorable. But her whole family is preoccupied with her sister's wedding and completely forgets Samantha's big day.

programme.title: Grease
programme.desc: Things are really hoppin' at Rydell High when Danny discovers the object of his summer fling, Sandy, has moved to town and enrolled in his school.

programme.title: Playing with Fire
programme.desc: After a near-fatal house fire, Natalie and Loughlin, a struggling married couple, are manipulated by an obsessive firefighter named Jack, who schemes to pit the couple against each other.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: There's a New Killer in Town
programme.desc: Alice is living a quiet life in a small town when she meets Ronnie. However, one of her friends starts to suspect that there's more to him than meets the eye.

programme.title: Lies Between Friends
programme.desc: A wealthy family's world is turned upside down when the 18-year-old daughter of a family friend moves in with them for a few months.

programme.title: Am I A Serial Killer?
programme.desc: A teenage girl visits her mum on death row and gets lured into a dangerous trap to take the fall for her mother's crimes.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: Date at Your Own Risk
programme.desc: Eva becomes horrified when she reads an online post where other women accuse her ex-fiance of harassment and aggressive behaviour.

programme.title: Match, Meet, Murder
programme.desc: A lingerie designer meets a handsome stranger who's smart, successful, and a former contestant on a dating show. However, she soon learns that the show wasn't the only secret he failed to mention.

programme.title: Wrath: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Single lawyer Chastity Jeffries believes she's found her perfect match in Xavier Collins, but his obsessive love forces her to confront how far she's strayed from her own principles.

programme.title: Wedding Planner Mystery
programme.desc: A wedding planner turns amateur sleuth when she investigates a suspicious death and the kidnapping of a bride.

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Black Girl Missing
programme.desc: Cheryl's daughter goes missing and is nowhere to be found. Authorities and the media dismiss her as a runaway while they focus on another missing girl, who is white.

programme.title: Buried in Barstow
programme.desc: Hazel King is a single mother determined to protect her daughter from the life she once had while defending and protecting those who can't protect themselves.

programme.title: My Child has My Doctor's Face
programme.desc: Jessica discovers that his biological father is actually her fertility doctor, she teams up with another one of the doctor's clients to bring him to justice.

programme.title: Spinning Out Of Control
programme.desc: Infatuated and obsessed with a fitness instructor, Natalie hatches a devious plan to eliminate everyone in the young woman's life so she can have her all to herself.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: Breathe
programme.desc: The inspiring true love story of Robin and Diana Cavendish, an adventurous couple who refuse to give up in the face of a devastating disease.

programme.title: A Bump Along The Way
programme.desc: Forty-four-year-old single mother, Pamela, finds herself pregnant after a drunken one-night-stand, leaving her tightly-wound teen daughter, Allegra, ashamed of her deadbeat mum.

programme.title: McKellen: Playing the Part
programme.desc: Built upon a 14-hour interview, this film is a unique journey through the key landmarks of McKellen's life.

programme.title: Oranges and Sunshine
programme.desc: A powerful true story about a social worker who risks all in her effort to reunite families torn apart by a heartless government policy.

programme.title: Sometimes Always Never
programme.desc: A stylish and heartfelt comedy-drama about a tailor searching for a lost son.

programme.title: Death Defying Acts
programme.desc: Houdini starts an affair with a psychic out to con the famous escapologist. As the stakes get higher, it soon becomes a question of who is out-conning who.

programme.title: Death at a Funeral
programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric grief stricken mourners.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: White Riot
programme.desc: Telling the story of a vital national protest movement: Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: A master auctioneer becomes obsessed with an extremely reclusive heiress and collector of fine art, who he has never actually met.

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: This period drama tells the tale of two landscape artists who become romantically involved while constructing the grand gardens at King Louis XIV's palace at Versailles.

programme.title: Brooklyn
programme.desc: An Irish immigrant lands in 1950s Brooklyn, where she falls in love with a local. But when her past catches up with her, she must choose between two countries.

programme.desc: A dignified send-off for a loved one erupts into uproarious chaos when a myriad of outrageous calamities befall the eccentric grief stricken mourners.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: A huge storm sees the team from ranger headquarters involved in some dangerous rescues.

programme.title: A Town Like Alice
programme.desc: The women seek refuge in a Malay village for the duration of the war.

programme.desc: An ex-soldier whose life has been disrupted and his emotions disturbed by his experiences at war and in prison, escapes from police custody after attending the burial of his murdered brother.

programme.title: PowerPoint with Jack Graham
programme.desc: A vision of Dr Jack Graham to glorify God by introducing Jesus Christ as Lord to as many people as possible and to develop them in Christian living.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Every time Jesus performed a miracle, He revealed the Father's goodness to us!

programme.desc: Telling the story of a vital national protest movement: Rock Against Racism, formed in 1976 when a group of artists united to take on the National Front.

programme.desc: An acclaimed account of the great British painter who was a radical and revolutionary artist.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: Sea Fever
programme.desc: The crew of a West of Ireland trawler, marooned at sea, struggle for their lives against a growing parasite in their water supply.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. What happened next became the stuff of legend.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits, and inspire America to join the war.

programme.title: Calvary
programme.desc: In this compelling drama, a compassionate priest and estranged father confronts his own demons as he senses the menacing forces of his scornful parish closing in around him.

programme.title: To Olivia
programme.desc: Set between New York, England and Los Angeles, a chronicle of Dahl's struggles while writing some of his most famous works and Neal's return to acting and winning an Oscar.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: A troubled, volatile 15-year-old girl's mum brings a mysterious stranger into their home. It promises to change everything, but life isn't always that simple.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: This drama chronicles four seasons in the lives of a happy couple and their relationships with family and friends.

programme.title: Six Minutes to Midnight
programme.desc: Seventeen days before WWII, a teacher must try to exonerate himself in time to save the hearts and minds of his students from the grip of Hitler.

programme.title: The Duke
programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. What happened next became the stuff of legend.

programme.title: Careful, He Might Hear You
programme.desc: A young boy becomes a pawn caught in an elaborate web of deceit and torn between two feuding aunts.

programme.title: Frog Dreaming
programme.desc: Living with his guardian in an outback township, Cody learns of an ancient Aboriginal myth, sparking an interest that will not let him rest.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Sonny takes a job with a team of sheep shearers to earn money for a present for his father's birthday, unaware that the men are actually rustlers who intend to steal the wool.

programme.title: The Chant of Jimmie Blacksmith
programme.desc: The true story of a part aboriginal man who finds the pressure of adapting to white culture intolerable, and as a result snaps in a violent and horrific manner.

programme.title: Ten Canoes
programme.desc: In Australia's NT, a man tells us a story of his people. An older man, Minygululu, who has three wives realizes that his younger brother Dayindi may try to steal away the youngest wife.

programme.title: Tudawali
programme.desc: A look behind the life of the first Indigenous Australian film star, and how he became an iconic actor in Australian cinema.

programme.title: Sons of Steel
programme.desc: When Aussie heavy metal singer and peace activist Black Alice finds himself in a dystopian future, he must go back in time to save the world from a nuclear disaster.

programme.title: Rose Tattoo: Live at Boggo Road Jail '93
programme.desc: Performing here in front of a huge crowd at Boggo Road Jail in 1993, the band delivers a thumping set of seminal Oz rock, rolling out all their big hits.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: An actor hired by Dr. Stark attempts to discredit Matt while impersonating him by running a car containing his boss and a Government Senator off the road.

programme.title: A Town Like Alice
programme.desc: Joe and Jean have a strained reunion as Strachan heads to Queensland.

programme.title: The Tracker
programme.desc: (2002) David Gulpilil, Gary Sweet. An Aboriginal tracker assisting a manhunt for a fugitive native leads the white man into a heart of darkness from which there is no return.

programme.title: Blackfellas
programme.desc: An Aboriginal man struggles between loyalty to his people and his desire to break free from a cycle of self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: To Make a Killing
programme.desc: A wealthy teenager becomes involved in robbery and murder when he joins a violent street gang in Sydney, Australia.

programme.title: Sons of Steel
programme.desc: When Aussie heavy metal singer and peace activist Black Alice finds himself in a dystopian future, he must go back in time to save the world from a nuclear disaster.

programme.title: The Adventures of Barry McKenzie
programme.desc: After he comes into a small inheritance, Barry McKenzie sets off for England with his aunt, Edna Everage to advance his cultural education.

programme.title: Malcolm
programme.desc: Malcolm, a chronically shy mechanical genius who has just been fired for building his own tram, naively helps a pair of bank robbers in a series of outrageous heists.

programme.desc: Attempting to repress her feelings for Abe, Joan finds solace in Harriet and Frida, who may be hiding secrets of their own. Meanwhile, Confucius teaches JFK about the internet.

programme.desc: As Candide's manufactured crisis wreaks havoc, Joan begins to doubt her relationship with JFK, Abe turns to Frida for advice, and Harriet frets over a future as a #winemom.

programme.desc: After a figh with Scudworth, Mr B prepares to leave Clone High for good - but not before telling Joan his epic back story.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: As Operation Spread Eagle ends, the students of Clone High are offered the opportunity to attend Clone High College. But when the entrance exam proves deadly, Joan must fend for herself.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: Joan returns from summer break a social pariah. Harriet teams up with Toussaint Louverture to take down a suspicious new science teacher.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: Don't You Get It? Sports Are Huge In This Town
programme.desc: Scudworth takes Frida under his wing, causing the would-be artist to consider a more lucrative career in competitive snorkelling.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: Bible Humpers: A Much Needed Praycation
programme.desc: While Scudworth seeks to make Clone High a tax-exempt religious school, JFK's new relationship with God threatens his friendship with Abe.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: The Principal Principle: Sub Zero To Sub Hero
programme.desc: When Scudworth makes Joan principal for the day, she throws a redemption-worthy rager alongside a reluctant Abe.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: Money Can Buy Me Love: Stupid Is As Cupid Does
programme.desc: As Valentine's Day nears, Confucius and Joan con Harriet into thinking they're a couple. Meanwhile, Scudworth swoons over an old nemesis.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.sub-title: Go Yell It On The Mountain: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Tensions mount on a ski trip to Avalanche Mountain, threatening love triangles, bromances and Mr B's sanity.

programme.title: Clone High
programme.desc: After falling for mysterious manic pixie dream girl Mary, Abe risks life and limb to shed his status as Clone High's resident virgin.

programme.desc: In 1961, Kempton Bunton, a 60-year-old taxi driver, steals Goya's portrait of the Duke of Wellington from the National Gallery in London. What happened next became the stuff of legend.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits, and inspire America to join the war.

programme.title: Calvary
programme.desc: In this compelling drama, a compassionate priest and estranged father confronts his own demons as he senses the menacing forces of his scornful parish closing in around him.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: After murdering the King of Scotland and taking the throne, Macbeth begins to unravel as he becomes consumed with paranoia and guilt.

programme.title: Ammonite
programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Suffragette
programme.desc: In early 20th-century Britain, a young working mother joins a diverse group of women who fight for equality and the right to vote.

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: Painstakingly assembled over the last six years, British film icon Michael Caine tells the vivid and inspiring story of his personal journey through 1960s London.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Paul Giamatti, James Purefoy, Kate Mara and Brian Cox star in this rollicking Robin Hood-style adventure.

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: March, 1918. C-company arrives to take its turn in the front-line trenches in northern France, led by the war-weary Captain Stanhope.

programme.title: On Chesil Beach
programme.desc: In 1962 England, a young couple find their idyllic romance colliding with issues of sexual freedom and societal pressure.

programme.title: God Help The Girl
programme.desc: Life has never been easy for Eve, but this troubled young girl has a talent and songwriting becomes her way forward. Through her passion for music, she's led to Glasgow's music scene.

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: After being banished from Rome, a revered and feared Roman General allies himself with his sworn enemy to take his revenge on the city.

programme.title: Swimming with Men
programme.desc: Eric joins an all-male group of synchronised swimmers, discovering that making patterns in a pool can, for a couple of hours at least, smooth out the bumps in his life.

programme.title: The Queen of Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary following the life of Irish drag queen Panti Bliss, in the lead up to the historic referendum on marriage equality for same-sex couples in Ireland.

programme.title: Mr. Reliable
programme.desc: Police believe small-time crook Wally Mellish has his wife and child as hostages, as he relishes the media circus.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: An actor hired by Dr. Stark attempts to discredit Matt while impersonating him by running a car containing his boss and a Government Senator off the road.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: Ms. Selby uses a stranger's arrival on Circe Island to spark a creative writing exercise, sending her students' imaginations into overdrive as the man lands onshore.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Bolton falls for a Chinese debating opponent from Allie's old school.

programme.title: The Tracker
programme.desc: (2002) David Gulpilil, Gary Sweet. An Aboriginal tracker assisting a manhunt for a fugitive native leads the white man into a heart of darkness from which there is no return.

programme.title: Blackfellas
programme.desc: An Aboriginal man struggles between loyalty to his people and his desire to break free from a cycle of self-destructive behaviour.

programme.title: The Man from Coxs River
programme.desc: Can a quest to save a mob of brumbies in inaccessible wilderness bring a fiercely independent horseman and a ranger enemy to see the world through each other's eyes?

programme.title: Windrider
programme.desc: A female rock singer romances a champion surfer, but just as it seems life couldn't get better setbacks threaten a wipeout. Nicole Kidman stars in her first adult role, with Tom Burlinson.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Dr. Stark gets one of his henchmen to impersonate zoologist Professor Lewis. Armed with a mace gun disguised as a camera, the henchman attempts to steal some female anteaters.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: Kelvin's bid for Babe's rock stardom and Hermes' attempt to impress Ms. Selby unravel when new girl Lou Docherty shows off her impressive science skills.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Forced to take cooking class, the boys make unorthodox cupcakes.

programme.title: Sunday Too Far Away
programme.desc: A hard-drinking but hard-working gun shearer leads a group of outback sheep herders into striking after wealthy landowners attempt to drive them from their territory.

programme.title: The Picture Show Man
programme.desc: At the beginnings of the 20th century, a man, his son and a piano player travel around Australia showing the first silent movies but they desire to open their own cinema.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Forced to take cooking class, the boys make unorthodox cupcakes.

programme.title: Dark Age
programme.desc: An Australian government ranger and two indigenous guides hunt a legendary 25-foot crocodile.

programme.title: The Man from Coxs River
programme.desc: Can a quest to save a mob of brumbies in inaccessible wilderness bring a fiercely independent horseman and a ranger enemy to see the world through each other's eyes?

programme.title: Windrider
programme.desc: A female rock singer romances a champion surfer, but just as it seems life couldn't get better setbacks threaten a wipeout. Nicole Kidman stars in her first adult role, with Tom Burlinson.

programme.title: Australian Rules
programme.desc: This coming-of-age saga is played out on an AFL field of dreams muddied by racial conflict. These footy-mad mates are colour-blind, but they're caught between warring worlds.

programme.title: The Club
programme.desc: The coach of an Aussie rules team is under pressure because his team is playing at an all-time low. The players storm the boardroom when they are informed this will be his last season.

programme.title: Spotswood
programme.desc: An expert on productivity shows wacky workers in 1966 Australia how to run their moccasin factory like clockwork, despite laying off more than half the workforce.

programme.desc: A fascinating retelling of one the most dramatic duels in The Open's long and storied history between Tom Watson and Stewart Cink - a near-miraculous moment on Scotland's west coast where time, fate, and golf collided.

programme.title: The Open: 2009

programme.title: DUEL: Golf's Greatest Showdown

programme.desc: The Open is back for its 150th annual tournament being held at St Andrew's with the world's best ready for the oldest running major.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: All aboard! The trust between Sam, Elle, and Gizmo is tested by a hungry supernatural stranger on a train.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: When a raging storm forces her, Sam, and Gizmo to seek shelter, Elle struggles to hide her past from her friends and a too-friendly innkeeper.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: Always Buy A God A Drink First

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: It's a race against the clock as Sam, Elle, and Gizmo battle fearsome - yet adorable - monsters on their way to the Valley of Jade as long as Greene and the Gremlins don't catch up with them first.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: The Wing family is back in adventure mode after Sam discovers new evidence of Mogwai related problems, and Gizmo starts to act different.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Magic has dropped our heroes short of their San Francisco destination, so now they must escape a notorious prison and its unusual guards.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Upon reaching San Francisco's Chinatown, our heroes, and their newfound prison buddy Chang, discover its criminal underworld has been taken over by an old acquaintance.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Sam and Chang recruit help to rescue Gizmo from Noggin's Evil Mogwai gang, while Elle discovers that her mother is alive but facing her own magical problem.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: There's Always A Fortune In The Cookie Factory
programme.desc: It's the battle for Chinatown. But will Chang and Chinatown's residents ultimately choose to side with our heroes?

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.sub-title: Never Get Out Of The Truck
programme.desc: Our heroes journey west to free Elle's mother, but first must free themselves from a haunted old mansion.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: Still on their western quest, our heroes are recruited to help an unusual town with their own supernatural problem: nightly hauntings by a legendary ghost.

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai
programme.desc: To reach their destination, our heroes pass through the resting place for all the west's wildest tall tales and legends. However, its temptations might finally unleash Gizmo's inner Evil Mogwai.

programme.title: Connect
programme.desc: A school theatre group aspires to stage every book of the Bible.

programme.title: Jentezen Franklin
programme.sub-title: How to Redeem Your Family Name Series Part 2
programme.desc: Pastor Jentezen Franklin, brings meaning to spiritual truths found in God's Word. Kingdom Connection is the teaching ministry of Free Chapel, a multi-campus church.

programme.title: The Christian View
programme.desc: A fast-paced, high-energy half-hour show with a panel of sharp, well-educated, quick-witted women and men - and the occasional guest co-host - discussing today's hot topics and headlines from a Biblical perspective.

programme.title: At the Table
programme.desc: Real women, real conversations, real issues. It's where you'll find information on family, health and spirituality, but most of all, a community doing motherhood together.

programme.title: The Restoration Road
programme.desc: None of us arrive anywhere by accident. We choose, think, pray, and feel our way to our destination. Our inner GPS guides us to one of two places: destruction or restoration.

programme.title: Bible Discovery TV
programme.desc: Hosted by the Hembree family, this is a daily devotional show where Rod, Janice, Ryan and Corie walk you through the Word in a way that will forever change how you read, learn and experience the Bible.

programme.title: Answers with Bayless Conley
programme.sub-title: The Lord Is My Shepherd Part 2
programme.desc: In part two of The Lord Is My Shepherd, Pastor Bayless looks at the peace and restoration Jesus promises His sheep.

programme.title: Katherine Ruonala Ministries
programme.desc: Every time Jesus performed a miracle, He revealed the Father's goodness to us!

programme.title: The 700 Club
programme.desc: A daily program with news, interviews, lifestyle features and true-life stories from a Christian perspective, including powerful and dramatic testimonies of God touching people's lives.

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: The love you have to give can be life-changing! Discover the difference you can make by trusting God and loving people.

programme.title: In Touch
programme.sub-title: The Will of God in Your Life/The Courage to Face Life's Trials
programme.desc: Tackling important issues such as parenting, finances, personal crises, emotions, and relationships, Dr Stanley fervently believes the Bible to be the inerrant Word of God.

programme.title: The Happy Camper
programme.desc: When Dillon's love life falls apart she returns to her grandfather's farm in Colorado, where she works with Jordan, a handsome hardware store owner, to restore a vintage 1960s caravan, and along the way, finds new love.

programme.title: Compassion Stories
programme.desc: Follow powerful stories highlighting the transformative work of the Compassion Child Sponsorship Program in Africa, South America, India and Asia.

programme.title: Jeni: Seeking the Extraordinary
programme.desc: Jeni and Casey are back this time road-tripping around the Pacific North West, seeing the sights, and meeting extraordinary people along the way.

programme.title: Bible Man
programme.desc: Miles Peterson had everything: Money, power, fame. Until he lost it. Then Miles finds the power of God and harnesses that power to become Bibleman.

programme.title: Sea Kids
programme.desc: The Sea Kids will help transform the heart and mind of every child as they learn how to tangibly live out biblical principles and build a strong foundation in Jesus.

programme.title: Holy Moly
programme.desc: This program turns the Bible into a living, breathing colouring book that will delight children of all ages. The series focuses on the Biblical characters' actions and emotions.

programme.desc: Emma is a young Amish woman who leads a double life by sneaking out to clubs to flirt and have fun. However, when she accidentally witnesses a murder, her life and community get thrown into peril.

programme.title: The Queen of Ireland
programme.desc: Documentary following the life of Irish drag queen Panti Bliss, in the lead up to the historic referendum on marriage equality for same-sex couples in Ireland.

programme.title: My Generation
programme.desc: Painstakingly assembled over the last six years, British film icon Michael Caine tells the vivid and inspiring story of his personal journey through 1960s London.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Paul Giamatti, James Purefoy, Kate Mara and Brian Cox star in this rollicking Robin Hood-style adventure.

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: March, 1918. C-company arrives to take its turn in the front-line trenches in northern France, led by the war-weary Captain Stanhope.

programme.title: The Unlikely Pilgrimage of Harold Fry
programme.desc: Harold is an ordinary man who has passed through life, living on the side lines, until he goes to post a letter one day and just keeps walking.

programme.title: What We Did on Our Holiday
programme.desc: Doug and Abi take their three children on a trip to Scotland for a big family gathering. They are in the midst of a difficult divorce, and have asked the kids to keep it a secret from their family.

programme.title: The Man Who Knew Infinity
programme.desc: An inspiration film that explores the brilliance of a mathematician that many believed could decipher the very fabric of the universe - possibly existence itself.

programme.title: Age of Heroes
programme.desc: This action adventure documents the true story of the elite 30 Commando unit, formed during World War II by the man who would later become novelist Ian Fleming, and their risky mission in Norway.

programme.title: I, Daniel Blake
programme.desc: When a middle-aged carpenter suffers a heart attack, he struggles as he must work his way through the bureaucratic world of welfare.

programme.title: Mr. Holmes
programme.desc: An aged, retired Sherlock Holmes deals with early dementia as he tries to remember both his final case and a mysterious woman whose memory haunts him.

programme.title: Comes a Bright Day
programme.desc: Love blooms in the most unusual circumstances when a bellboy and a beautiful shopgirl are taken hostage in a jewel store heist.

programme.title: Beast
programme.desc: Moll is stifled by her surroundings, but too beholden to her family to break away. When she meets Pascal, a free-spirited stranger, a whole new world opens up to her.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: 6 Days
programme.desc: The incredible true story of six days of terror, after six heavily-armed gunmen invade the Iranian Embassy in London in 1980 and take 26 people hostage.

programme.title: Spotswood
programme.desc: An expert on productivity shows wacky workers in 1966 Australia how to run their moccasin factory like clockwork, despite laying off more than half the workforce.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: Dr. Stark gets one of his henchmen to impersonate zoologist Professor Lewis. Armed with a mace gun disguised as a camera, the henchman attempts to steal some female anteaters.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: Kelvin's bid for Babe's rock stardom and Hermes' attempt to impress Ms. Selby unravel when new girl Lou Docherty shows off her impressive science skills.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Forced to take cooking class, the boys make unorthodox cupcakes.

programme.title: Sunday Too Far Away
programme.desc: A hard-drinking but hard-working gun shearer leads a group of outback sheep herders into striking after wealthy landowners attempt to drive them from their territory.

programme.title: The Picture Show Man
programme.desc: At the beginnings of the 20th century, a man, his son and a piano player travel around Australia showing the first silent movies but they desire to open their own cinema.

programme.title: 40,000 Horsemen
programme.desc: Three young Australians join the army at the beginning of World War I and are assigned to the Australian Light Horse cavalry, which is serving in Palestine.

programme.title: Fatty Finn
programme.desc: Rival gangs clash in a Sydney ghetto near the end of the Depression.

programme.title: Skippy
programme.desc: A young aboriginal woman with a beautiful singing voice is pulled between her dream to further her singing career and the call of her elders to return to her people.

programme.title: Ship to Shore
programme.desc: Julie and Gavin oppose a corporate-sponsored bike race they fear will harm Circe Island's wildlife. Tensions rise as Hermes faces Gavin in a thrilling match race.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Danielle finds the body of an elderly neighbour; Declan discovers that his mother has multiple sclerosis; Katerina meets her Internet boyfriend.

programme.title: The Coca-Cola Kid
programme.desc: A corporate soft-drink sales ace finds an Australian valley where everyone buys a local eccentric's brand.

programme.title: The Coolangatta Gold
programme.desc: Joe Lucas is determined that his son Adam will become a champion iron man. He neglects his younger son, Steve, who is an aspiring band manager and enjoys karate.

programme.title: Heartbreak High
programme.desc: Danielle finds the body of an elderly neighbour; Declan discovers that his mother has multiple sclerosis; Katerina meets her Internet boyfriend.

programme.title: Black Water
programme.desc: A mangrove adventure involving eluding a man eating crocodile, rescuing an overturned boat, and getting back down river alive: a seemingly-impossible task.

programme.title: 40,000 Horsemen
programme.desc: Three young Australians join the army at the beginning of World War I and are assigned to the Australian Light Horse cavalry, which is serving in Palestine.

programme.title: Sweat
programme.desc: Monique's temporary coach pretends to be in love with her, boosting her diving performance. When she discovers it was a manipulation, she's heartbroken and devastated.

programme.title: The Merger
programme.desc: Bodgy Creek is a struggling town. The drought won't let up, jobs are scarce, and the footy team looks like it will have to merge with another club or fold.

programme.title: The Rats of Tobruk
programme.desc: Anzacs wage a long and courageous resistance to Nazi invasion during World War II.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills

programme.title: The Perfect Murder

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai

programme.title: Gremlins: Secrets of the Mogwai

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: Adventures Of A Normal Man Pt. 1
programme.desc: Secret alien Clark and Jimmy start their internship at The Daily Planet and meet fellow intern Lois Lane - who ropes them into investigating stolen military robots threatening Metropolis!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: Adventures Of A Normal Man Pt. 2
programme.desc: Clark returns to the Kent farm with questions about where he's from - and who he wants to be. Meanwhile, Lois and Jimmy track down the mercenary Livewire and encounter "Superman" once again!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois wants to interview Superman and Clark must figure out how to help her while protecting his secret identity! Meanwhile, criminal ring Intergang gets their hands on unstable weapons.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: Let's Go To Ivo Tower, You Say
programme.desc: Clark, Lois and Jimmy cover a glitzy gala hosted by tech-billionaire Dr Ivo - but while Clark and Lois wonder if this counts as a date, Ivo unleashes his newest invention to bring down Superman!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: You Will Believe A Man Can Lie
programme.desc: Lois uncovers a secret in Metropolis and is determined to get to the truth. Superman tracks down dangerous weapons in the city and finds himself in the crosshairs of Task Force X.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: When Jimmy gets kidnapped, it's up to Lois and Clark to save him - but rescuing Jimmy will lead them into danger as they deal with mad scientists, military secrets, and relationship woes!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Clark tries to plan a normal date without any Superman problems - but gets interrupted when Mr. Mxyzptlk sweeps him, Jimmy, and Lois into a high-stakes, multiverse-hopping chase!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois meets her journalism idol, Vicki Vale - only for Vicki to make Lois question her loyalty to Superman. Meanwhile, Superman hunts down Task Force X while dealing with a new power!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Superman gets answers to who he is and where he came from, while coming face-to-face with The General, leader of Task Force X. Meanwhile, Lois and Jimmy must find Superman before Dr. Ivo destroys Metropolis!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: It's Thanksgiving and Clark, Lois and Jimmy are heading to the Kent farm to celebrate - but the holiday turns into a fight for survival as Task Force X, family, and Kryptonite collide!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: More Things In Heaven And Earth
programme.desc: Clark agonizes over what to do for his and Lois' first Valentine's Day; Visions of his father lead him, Jimmy, and Lois to the remains of his spaceship and the new villains of Task Force X.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Perry saddles Jimmy with a new team to run Flamebird; Clark and Lois investigate Stryker Penitentiary and discover how far Amanda Waller will go to rid the world of Superman.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Clark's life falls apart as The General goes into hiding in Clark's flat. Jimmy struggles with being a leader, and Lois goes toe-to-toe with Vicki Vale as they track down missing scientists.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Jimmy gets invited to the STAR Labs Symposium. Clark joins him for support, but Lex Luthor takes over; the General flees, and Lois chases after him.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Clark's relationship come to the breaking point when Superman receives the title of Metropolis' most eligible bachelor; Jimmy gives a girl a tour of the city.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.sub-title: The Machine Who Would Be Empire
programme.desc: Kidnapped and far from home, Superman bonds with his cousin Kara. He discovers the truth about Krypton from the last Kryptonians in existence.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Jimmy recruit mercenaries and mad scientists to help them steal a spaceship out from under the nose of Task Force X.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Lois and Jimmy confront Kara and make a plan to rescue Clark. Meanwhile, Brainiac delves into Superman's mind to figure out what makes him tick and how to tear him apart!

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Jimmy and Kara race back to Metropolis to stop Brainiac's invasion of Earth; Lois tries to free Clark from Brainiac's control, only to lose herself in an alternate reality.

programme.title: My Adventures With Superman
programme.desc: Superman, Kara, Lois and Jimmy team up to fight Brainiac; Superman has to choose between saving Earth and saving the people he loves.

programme.title: MotoGP Mini: Argentina

programme.title: MotoGP Mini: USA
